# Celestia Build documentation

> Section-specific LLM index for the Build area of the Celestia docs.

- Full docs index: https://docs.celestia.org/llms.txt
- Full LLM context: https://docs.celestia.org/llms-full.txt

## Blobstream

- [Integrate Contracts](https://docs.celestia.org/build/blobstream/integrate-contracts.md)
- [Integrate Offchain](https://docs.celestia.org/build/blobstream/integrate-offchain.md)
- [Proof Queries](https://docs.celestia.org/build/blobstream/proof-queries.md)

- [Client / Go](https://docs.celestia.org/build/post-retrieve-blob/client/go.md)
